title: The Shadow Circle
description: Intelligence has uncovered a rival magical organization operating in secret - the Shadow Circle. They're researching forbidden magic and acquiring dangerous artifacts. Investigate their activities near the Bandit Hideout, discover what they're planning, and stop them before they unleash something catastrophic.

objectives.description: Gather intelligence on Shadow Circle activities
Infiltrate the Shadow Circle's base near Bandit Hideout

objectives.notes: Break the ritual circle before completion

objectives.description: Report your findings to Archmage Elara

notes: Final Journeyman quest. Promotion to Adept rank. Stealth and combat. Introduces Shadow Circle as recurring antagonists. Rewards adept robes.
